name: Security / Risk Report

> ⚠️ **For serious vulnerabilities, do NOT use this public template.**
> Email hans@hveglobal.ca with subject `[SECURITY] Mercury — <description>` instead.

## Severity
- [ ] Critical (funds at risk)
- [ ] High (node exposure or data leak)
- [ ] Medium (degraded security posture)
- [ ] Low (hardening opportunity)

## Description
<!-- What is the risk or vulnerability? -->

## Affected Component
<!-- Which command, config file, or subsystem? -->

## Suggested Mitigation
<!-- How should this be addressed? -->
